name: Daniel Lanois
abstract: Daniel Roland Lanois  ( lan-WAH, French: [lanwa]; born September 19, 1951) is a Canadian record producer and musician. He has produced albums by artists including Bob Dylan, Neil Young, Peter Gabriel, Robbie Robertson, Emmylou Harris, Willie Nelson, and Harold Budd.

about_quotes.speaker: Bela Fleck
about_quotes.evidence: I thought it would be neat to get like Daniel Lanois or somebody to help us paint a whole different sonic picture
about_quotes.doc_title: Bela Fleck interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, December 7, 2004
